items: Choosing "New session here" from inside a worktree now nests the new session under that worktree, instead of showing it as a separate top-level entry.
Opening diffs and browsing the file tree now reads git status in the background, so the app stays responsive on large repositories.
The five-hour usage bar now fetches its data off the main thread, keeping the interface smooth while it refreshes.
Diff inspector cards in accordion view now keep a readable minimum width and scroll sideways when a change is too wide, instead of being squeezed.
